This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-p4hc-9pjh-55c8. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
Versions of the package ssrfcheck below 1.2.0 are vulnerable to Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) due to an incomplete denylist of IP address ranges. Specifically, the package fails to classify the reserved IP address space 224.0.0.0/4 (Multicast) as invalid. This oversight allows attackers to craft requests targeting these multicast addresses.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c2fv-2fmj-9xrx", "github_reviewed_at": "2025-07-28T16:42:51Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c2fv-2fmj-9xrx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c2fv-2fmj-9xrx"}], "nvd_published_at": "2025-07-28T05:16:20Z", "published_at": "2025-07-28T06:30:23Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-8267", "https://github.com/felippe-regazio/ssrfcheck/issues/5", "https://github.com/felippe-regazio/ssrfcheck/commit/9507b49fd764f2a1a1d1e3b9ee577b7545e6950e", "https://gist.github.com/lirantal/2976840639df824cb3abe60d13c65e04", "https://security.snyk.io/vuln/SNYK-JS-SSRFCHECK-9510756", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c2fv-2fmj-9xrx"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/felippe-regazio/ssrfcheck", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: ssrfcheck has Incomplete IP Address Deny List that leads to Server-Side Request Forgery Vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T20:25:34Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c2fv-2fmj-9xrx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "ssrfcheck"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-05T20:25:33Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: ssrfcheck has Incomplete IP Address Deny List that leads to Server-Side Request Forgery Vulnerability
